text: The dimly lit room cloaks me in stillness and secrecy. Above, the cold lines of industrial pipes crisscross; to my right, a monitor glows, words trailing upwards, offering faint guidance. I feel a sense of solitude—perhaps the world outside is asleep. This isolation is both comforting and uncanny, as though I am adrift in a sea of machines, awaiting clarity or a spark of purpose.
